name: andrej-karpathy-skills
description: A Codex-native surgical coding discipline for smaller diffs, clearer assumptions, and verifiable outcomes.

interface.shortDescription: Keep Codex coding changes deliberate, narrow, and verifiable.
interface.longDescription: A Codex skill that teaches agents to frame requests, shrink patches, respect existing code surfaces, and prove outcomes with focused checks.
defaultPrompt: Frame this coding request before editing.
Simplify this implementation without widening scope.
Review this patch for unrelated edits and weak verification.
Define success criteria for this bug fix.
